items.title: How @deco rewrites a call
items.mermaid:
flowchart LR
  A["@deco above greet"] --> B["greet = deco(greet)"]
  B --> C["name 'greet' now points at wrapper"]
  C --> D["call greet(x)"]
  D --> E["wrapper runs extra behavior"]
  E --> F["wrapper calls original greet(x)"]
  F --> G["return result"]
items.caption: Decorating rebinds the function name to the wrapper returned by the decorator.

items.title: Layers of a parametrized decorator
items.mermaid:
flowchart TD
  R["retry(times=3)"] --> D["returns deco(fn)"]
  D --> W["returns wrapper(*args, **kwargs)"]
  W --> L["loops up to 3 times calling fn"]
items.caption: A decorator that takes arguments adds one extra function layer: arguments -> decorator -> wrapper.
